notes: "Video card outdated" warning pop up every time I start the game, after clicking "yes", the game starts without problem.
title: Scrabble

notes: Just like the previous person who reported for this game mentioned, I got the error message saying the video driver was out of date. If you click "No" at that prompt the game just closes, but clicking "Yes" allows it to continue and it worked just fine with the default settings from there.
title: Scrabble
